mapper.select:
SELECT T.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, T.PAY_DATE, T.HR_START_DATE, T.HR_END_DATE, T.AR_START_DATE, T.AR_END_DATE, T.PERSON_ID, T.EMPID, T.LOCAL_NAME, T.DEPTNO, T.DEPT_NAME, T.POST_FAMILY_NO, T.POST_FAMILY, T.POSITION_NO, T.POSITION_NAME, T.POST_GRADE_NO, T.POST_GRADE, T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, T.EMP_TYPE_NAME, T.EMP_OFFICE, T.EMP_OFFICE_NAME, T.ACCOUNT_NO, T.P_TAX_FAMILY_DEDUCT_COUNT AS DEPENDENT_COUNT, T.BANK_NAME AS BANK_NAME, T.ACCOUNT_NO AS BANK_ACCOUNT_NO, T.SOCIAL_INSURANCE_NO AS SOCIAL_INSURANCE_NO FROM PA_SUMMARY_HTSV T
ORDER BY T.DEPT_ORDERNO, T.EMPID

SELECT T.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, T.PAY_DATE, T.HR_START_DATE, T.HR_END_DATE, T.AR_START_DATE, T.AR_END_DATE, T.PERSON_ID, T.EMPID, T.LOCAL_NAME, T.DEPTNO, T.DEPT_NAME, T.POST_FAMILY_NO, T.POST_FAMILY, T.POSITION_NO, T.POSITION_NAME, T.POST_GRADE_NO, T.POST_GRADE, T.EMP_TYPE_CODE, T.EMP_TYPE_NAME, T.EMP_OFFICE, T.EMP_OFFICE_NAME, T.ACCOUNT_NO, T.P_TAX_FAMILY_DEDUCT_COUNT AS DEPENDENT_COUNT, T.BANK_NAME AS BANK_NAME, T.ACCOUNT_NO AS BANK_ACCOUNT_NO, T.SOCIAL_INSURANCE_NO AS SOCIAL_INSURANCE_NO FROM PA_SUMMARY_HTSV T WHERE T.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT T.CPNY_ID, T.PERSON_ID, T.ITEM_TYPE, T.ITEM_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T.ITEM_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ITEM_NAME, T.ITEM_VALUE, T.ORDERNO, T.CREATE_BY, TO_CHAR(T.CREATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') CREATE_DATE FROM PA_EMP_SALARY_PAGE_DATA T WHERE T.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY T.ITEM_TYPE, T.ORDERNO, T.ITEM_NO

SELECT TO_NUMBER(NVL(C.RETURN_VALUE, 0)) RETURN_VALUE, C.REMARK FROM PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM B, PA_PARAM_DATA C, PA_SUMMARY_HTSV PA WHERE B.PARAM_NO = C.PARAM_NO AND C.PERSON_ID = PA.PERSON_ID AND B.PARAM_ITEM_NO IN ('540099', '90000496', '90000495', '90000494', '90000493') AND C.ACTIVITY = '1' AND B.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PA.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PA.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PA.PAY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MMYYYY'), 'MMYYYY') BETWEEN TO_DATE(C.START_MONTH, 'MMYYYY') AND NVL(TO_DATE(C.END_MONTH, 'MMYYYY'), TO_DATE('129999', 'MMYYYY')) ORDER BY C.CREATE_DATE
SELECT NVL(PA_CONFIRM_FLAG, 0) FROM PA_WORK_FLOW WHERE PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1
